final:
module dram_cell (  
    input wire clk,  
    input wire wr_enable,  
    input wire [3:0] addr,  
    input wire [15:0] data_in,  
    output reg [15:0] data_out  
);  
    reg [15:0] mem [0:15]; // 16 entries of 16-bit memory  

    always @(posedge clk) begin
  if (wr_enable) begin mem[addr] <= data_in ; end
  end

  always @(posedge clk) begin
  data_out <= mem[addr] ;
  end  
endmodule
